Class GuestCancelReservationController

java.lang.Object
Controllers.BaseDisplayController
Controllers.GuestCancelReservationController
public class GuestCancelReservationController extends BaseDisplayController
Controller for allowing a guest to cancel their reservation using a confirmation code. Extends BaseDisplayController to integrate with the reservation system.

      private int guestId
      The guest ID of the current guest. Default is -1 until set.

  • Method Details

    • setGuestId

      public void setGuestId(int guestId)
      Sets the guest ID for this controller.
      Parameters:
      guestId - the ID of the guest

    • onSubmitCancel

      private void onSubmitCancel()
      Handles the submission of a cancellation request. Validates the confirmation code entered by the guest and sends the cancel request to the server.

    • onClose

      public void onClose()
      Closes the current popup window.

    • showError

      public void showError(String message)
      Displays an error message in a simple alert dialog.
      Parameters:
      message - the error message to show

    • showMessage

      public void showMessage(String message)
      Displays an informational message in a simple alert dialog.
      Parameters:
      message - the message to show

    • showReservations

      public void showReservations(List<Reservation> list)
      Displays a list of reservations. Not implemented for guest cancellation.
      Specified by:
      showReservations in class BaseDisplayController
      Parameters:
      list - the list of Reservation objects
